notes.value: items[id][quality][cityIndex] = [p, t] or [p, t, b, bt]; p = sell_price_min (buy it / undercut it), b = buy_price_max (instant-sell exit), t/bt = epoch MINUTES of the AODP timestamp (0 = unknown)
notes.freshness: AODP is as fresh as the last player upload; the app must show age from t, never claim live
notes.missing: no entry = no standing order seen; the app must show a gap, never a guess
